name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient categorization causes late tax filings. We automate transaction categorization instead of manual bookkeeping and tax filing processes.
problem_solved: Difficulty in categorizing financial transactions and generating timely tax filings.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in categorizing financial transactions and generating timely tax filings.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient categorization causes late tax filings. We automate transaction categorization instead of manual bookkeeping and tax filing processes.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual bookkeeping and tax filing processes

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient categorization causes late tax filings. We automate transaction categorization instead of manual bookkeeping and tax filing processes.
